textByHash.a64d8dfb58be7e320ee2c40104a38717be1ed62b: G'day, mate. I'm Simon - Simon Templeton. Who are you?
textByHash.de571b6d0856b770d04274f16e3bb564b314eca6: I've been contracted to retrieve artefacts from the top of this magnificent pyramid.
textByHash.c9392329292d209fe62db2ad8e716e0569c32669: Well, it's me back - an old injury I picked up in Sophanem has come back to haunt me. I was working for the Museum of Varrock, and the gold I had been given wasn't enough to pay for the carpet rides, let
textByHash.4a4c8d2ebc58d083e08031b98134aed548220da4: alone any decent equipment. But that was a long time ago... I can't even lift a chisel right now. There's no way I can climb all the way up there.
textByHash.2268594b10299568d140f283c7c746566eea6d4d: That's what set off the injury. I was fine before I scrabbled down that pesky slope. I think it will be a while before I can climb back up again; I must be getting old.
textByHash.81e46b9f9652bb175c2f83c3451ac327062b892c: Hang on a second... You look like you're pretty agile and up for a challenge. How about you retrieve it for me?
textByHash.5c09593aeea7e6929ace352842d4b1eafedf1314: I'll tell you what, I'll give you 10000 coins for every artefact you get for me.
textByHash.9f006b19fc0a7ebc4781b32a8f3555761864280b: Not bad, mate, not bad at all. Got any artefacts for me?
textByHash.0d12b0b6287ccc1ee26032dc768f1d32f0079ca9: Try harder, mate! It won't be long till some other critter turns up and snatches them out from under your eyes.
textByHash.517b406301e00db740d76ec198198f9d38f143dd: Ripper! Thanks a bundle, mate! Thanks to you I can fulfill me contract. You're a true blue! The boss will be pleased.
textByHash.4bbb65e65ad2169ca4e40540bd1d95ac6bdca55f: Mind your own bizzo, mate. But if you get any more, you know where I am!
textByHash.7f55388a9bd1d70f2f5c0768d72ffd78bc29c392: Careful, mate, people might come looking for a thing like that!
textByHash.5f659195a0d63d6beb5e5cfcd70b52fb63c554ee: G'day, mate. Got any new pyramid artefacts for me?
textByHash.3c9dc30cf5a808d375687fe3437e2766d10ef2ce: Well, keep my offer in mind if you do find one.
textByHash.0aa4927de12e4360b358fddf69941d0ee1c6ae94: Bonzer! Let's have a Butcher's mate.
textByHash.dedb79a07c63925dda39d0d157c10f923c1526c2: Do you want to flog the lot of 'em?
textByHash.346a89c7d7e11f5e92d4477ba3ac7916afea897c: Fair Dinkum mate, Bonzer doing business with you mate.
textByHash.6fc93c4b3ff0c5d986f5da7593193c2afb1f5468: You sellin' me this gold coloured stick thing. Looks fake to me. I'll give you 100 gold for it.
textByHash.e1eccb1f73b67d00a6815314cd82ca17e922033e: Strewth! I can tell a pile of croc when I hear it! You've got the patter mate, but I'm no mug. That's a fake.
textByHash.5ccf4fdefb7f77e9f3a3b9ab2e9c63b91d3dcc36: Oh, magical powers ... yeah, yeah, yeah. Heard it all before mate. I'll give you a 100 gold, or some 'magic beans'. Take it or leave it.
textByHash.bc97cf1799c0c0d60c29344b1d4b214a617b8df1: Suit yerself.. You wanna sell the other artefacts you have?
textByHash.4e4e1d33ff9bebe8f08776f5eb07e17c1370c5e7: No probs mate. Just give me the items you want to sell and we can do them one by one.
textByHash.421e44f928fe4f4307d15f4382bb26bb4c983630: That's a nice looking artefact you got there mate. Gimme a chat and lemme explain what these are all about first!
